name: GIGABYTE B760 GAMING X AX ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7600(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.2 - HDMI 2.0 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax - BT 5.2
shortName: GIGABYTE B760 GAMING X AX ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Mid-range gaming ATX motherboard with B760 chipset, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 6E.
